---
title: "This year is NOT the most important year for you"
description: "During my 1:1 this morning with a team member, I found myself saying: \"This one year will not make or break your life.\""
date: "2023-03-03T00:00:00.000Z"
canonical_url: "https://warikoo.substack.com/p/2023-03-03-this-year-is-not-the-most-important-year-for-you"
slug: "2023-03-03-this-year-is-not-the-most-important-year-for-you"
---

During my 1:1 this morning with a team member, I found myself saying: "This one year will not make or break your life."

But as I said it, I realized I didn't feel the same way while in my 20s.

I think every year on the 1st of Jan, ever since I turned 18, I told myself: "This year is THE year. If I make it, everything will be ok. If I don't, life will be over!"

​

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!D4rq!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F43a80da2-47bf-4840-af94-08157f3b7e71_1080x914.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!D4rq!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F43a80da2-47bf-4840-af94-08157f3b7e71_1080x914.png)

​

Guess what?

Some years, the thing that I did want, happened. Some years, the thing I was scared of, happened.

But none of them changed the course of my life.

Life is all about every year adding to our experiences - good or bad - bit by bit.

So here is a reminder:

Do not put the pressure of making this year the make or break year.

If things go your way, you will still face challenges going forward.

If things do not go your way, you will still find success sooner than later.

None of your decisions this year will determine your entire life.

They will determine a part of your life, the smallest part that today seems so big that you can't look beyond it.  
You will wake up every day wishing for things to work out for you a certain way.   
It will be the first thing you will think of.  
Until one day it won't be.

You would have moved on to the next desire, the next goal, the next wish.

Instead of thinking a year as THE year for you, think of it as yet another year for you.

Yet another opportunity to grow, to learn, to fall, to rise up again.

You are bigger than any one year.

You are bigger than THE one year.

You got this :))

​

---

**Your struggle is in your mind, not in the real world.**

**[🐥 Share on Twitter](https://ctt.ac/Be995)**

---

​

​

# 📕 Books I'm reading this week

**​**

Finished reading **[When the Body Says No: The Cost of Hidden Stress](https://amzn.to/3XMi9Co)** by Gabor Mate.

Quite a heavy book - certainly for the intellectually inclined and not a book for beginners. Does a terrific, deep job of explaining how stress affects us in ways we do not think about it.

​

Started reading **[HOW TO DO THE WORK](https://amzn.to/3metoqa)** by Dr. Nicole LePera

Absolutely sensational book on how to **heal yourself from your past trauma.**

**Hint**: It is not therapy. It is through something that Nicole calls "the work". Simple yet powerful.

You HAVE TO follow Nicole on [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/the.holistic.psychologist/) or [Twitter](https://twitter.com/Theholisticpsyc) - her content is stunning. Hits you hard, explains so much.

​

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!uf9b!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2d407638-18b3-4979-9f7e-b7c7dc172806_2140x1080.png)](https://linktr.ee/ankurwarikoo)

​

​

# 🗣️ Response to last week's question

**​**

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!giz3!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fc902e1b4-35fa-462a-bc0f-0891d9ed5410_1920x1200.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!giz3!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fc902e1b4-35fa-462a-bc0f-0891d9ed5410_1920x1200.png)

​

​

Notice how scare about the future is:

* Really low when <18
* Peaks during the 20s
* Comes down as we age.

Similarly, excitement is:

* High when <18
* Goes down during 20s
* Peaks again as we age.

So if you are in your 20s and scared - **you are not alone**. It is the decade to be.   
You will be okay. Soon :)

Whenever I ask an audience this question, almost everyone who is excited or scared is both excited AND scared!   
Which is the right way to think about it :)))

My answer:  
​**I am 100% excited about the future. Really excited :)**

**​**

# 🙋🏻‍♂️ Question of the week

**​**

**Which of these is true for you?  
​**(*I have, on purpose, not given an option of "we are equal" - I want to force you to choose.)*

* I am the older sibling and I think I am smarter than them
* I am the younger sibling and I think I am smarter than them
* I am the older sibling and I think they are smarter than me
* I am the younger sibling and I think they are smarter than me
* I do not have any siblings
* Do not wish to vote

**[Let me know!](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeN95wGS-_YsPrYd6mMxY_JfwACMMUSUiG3PN_TTjxUmu6w2A/viewform)**

**​**

---

**The most dangerous leader is the one who hides information, to remain powerful.**

# 📸 Picture of the week

**​**

We had a reunion of all ex-nearbuy colleagues last Friday. 110+ folks showed up. Similar reunion in Bangalore had 60+ people.

​  
Felt so good connecting with ex-nbees (that's what we used to call ourselves) - reminiscing the good times. Super special!

​

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!UW7R!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F38d5b5c8-a166-4e1e-9fd9-b8009a90952f_1280x960.jpeg)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!UW7R!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F38d5b5c8-a166-4e1e-9fd9-b8009a90952f_1280x960.jpeg)
